panels.title: ztunnel pods Ready (per node)
panels.description: Number of ztunnel DaemonSet pods reporting Ready. Should equal the node count once the mesh is up.

panels.title: HBONE connections (live, last 5 min)
panels.description: Rate of mTLS-wrapped TCP connections opened across the mesh in the last 5 minutes. ztunnel exports this counter on every successful HBONE handshake. Uses connection_security_policy (the label ztunnel actually emits), not the old security_policy.

panels.title: % requests with mTLS
panels.description: Share of mesh requests where ztunnel reports connection_security_policy=mutual_tls. Should be 100% in a healthy Ambient mesh - anything lower means at least one workload is talking plaintext.

panels.title: Cross-namespace traffic (per source ns → destination ns)
panels.description: Each line is one (source_namespace → destination_namespace) pair. Use this to spot unexpected cross-namespace talk (e.g. anything from trustusbank-bank-vendors talking outside its own namespace is suspect once the rugpull is in play).

panels.title: AuthorizationPolicy denies (last 15 min)
panels.description: Real mesh-layer denies from ztunnel: connections that failed to establish because an AuthorizationPolicy rejected the HBONE handshake (response_flags=CONNECT). Excludes HTTP 403s from non-mesh sources like health probes - those aren't policy denies.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (source_workload, source_workload_namespace, source_principal, destination_service_name, destination_service_namespace) (increase(istio_tcp_connections_failed_total{response_flags="CONNECT"}[15m]))) > 0
